channel.title: Software on Los juguetes rebajados
channel.description: Recent content in Software on Los juguetes rebajados

item.title: Marvelous Europe - Akiba s Trip. Hellbound & Debriefed - Playstation 4
item.description: Ahora mismo tienes Marvelous Europe - Akiba s Trip. Hellbound & Debriefed - Playstation 4 en el siguiente enlace! 🔎: full Dual audio, enjoy hours of voiced-over banter in your choice of English or the original Japanese Playful reimagining of Japans Electronics Mecca, the famous Akihabara district has been painstakingly recreated to become a virtual Tour of Tokyos “electric town” Circa 2011, complete with accurate street layouts and shops based on real businesses present at the time fight like a Nerd, in the battle for Akihabara, anything counts as a weapon.
